title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 367.305 - Advance fee prohibited, penalty
text:
367.305.  Advance fee prohibited, penalty. — 1.  No loan broker shall charge, assess, collect or receive an advance fee from a borrower to provide services as a loan broker.
  2.  The knowing charging, assessment, collection or receipt of an advance fee, in violation of this section, is a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1992 S.B. 705)
